subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Ancient Beauty and the Great Announcement! The tokens of the Lord's mercy, even as a world of light, are manifest and visible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بجمال قدیم و نبا عظیم آثار رحمت پروردگار چون جهان انوار ظاهر و آشکار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
